003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.function.Suppliers.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
024
025import java.lang.annotation.*;
026import java.net.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.function.*;
029import java.util.stream.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
033
034/**
035 * Lightweight wrapper around a {@link Package} object providing convenient access to package metadata and annotations.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * This class provides a cached wrapper around Java {@link Package} objects, extending the standard API with
039 * convenient methods for accessing package annotations and metadata. Instances are cached and reused for efficiency.
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Features:</h5>
042 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
043 *    <li>Cached instances - package info objects are cached and reused
044 *    <li>Annotation support - get annotations declared on the package
045 *    <li>Convenient access - easy access to package name and metadata
046 *    <li>Thread-safe - instances are immutable and safe for concurrent access
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * <h5 class='section'>Use Cases:</h5>
050 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
051 *    <li>Accessing package-level annotations
052 *    <li>Working with package metadata
053 *    <li>Building frameworks that need to analyze package information
054 * </ul>
055 *
056 * <h5 class='section'>Usage:</h5>
057 * <p class='bjava'>
058 *    <jc>// Get PackageInfo from a class</jc>
059 *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>);
060 *
061 *    <jc>// Get package name</jc>
062 *    String <jv>name</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.getName();
063 *
064 *    <jc>// Get annotations</jc>
065 *    List&lt;AnnotationInfo&lt;MyAnnotation&gt;&gt; <jv>annotations</jv> =
066 *       <jv>pi</jv>.getAnnotations(MyAnnotation.<jk>class</jk>).toList();
067 * </p>
068 *
069 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
070 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ClassInfo} - Class introspection
071 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauCommonsReflection">Reflection Package</a>
072 * </ul>
073 */
074@SuppressWarnings({
075   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
076})
077public class PackageInfo implements Annotatable {
078
079   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
080   private static final String ARG_inner = "inner";
081
082   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
083   // Static
084   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
085
086   private static final Cache<Package,PackageInfo> CACHE = Cache.of(Package.class, PackageInfo.class).build();
087
088   /**
089    * Returns a package info wrapper around the package of the specified class.
090    *
091    * @param childClass The class whose package to retrieve.
092    * @return A package info wrapper.
093    */
094   public static PackageInfo of(Class<?> childClass) {
095      return of(childClass.getPackage());
096   }
097
098   /**
099    * Returns a package info wrapper around the package of the specified class info.
100    *
101    * @param childClass The class info whose package to retrieve.
102    * @return A package info wrapper.
103    */
104   public static PackageInfo of(ClassInfo childClass) {
105      return childClass.getPackage();
106   }
107
108   /**
109    * Returns a package info wrapper around the specified package object.
110    *
111    * @param inner The package object.
112    * @return A package info wrapper.
113    */
114   public static PackageInfo of(Package inner) {
115      return CACHE.get(inner, () -> new PackageInfo(inner));
116   }
117
118   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
119   // Instance
120   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
121
122   private final Package inner;
123   private final Supplier<List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>> annotations;  // All annotations on this package, wrapped in AnnotationInfo. Repeated annotations have been unwrapped and are present as individual instances.
124
125   /**
126    * Constructor.
127    *
128    * @param inner The package object.
129    */
130   protected PackageInfo(Package inner) {
131      assertArgNotNull(ARG_inner, inner);
132      this.inner = inner;
133      this.annotations = memoize(
134         () -> o(inner).map(pkg -> stream(pkg.getAnnotations()).flatMap(AnnotationUtils::streamRepeated).map(a -> AnnotationInfo.of(this, a)).toList()).orElse(emptyList()));
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is equal to this package.
139    *
140    * <p>
141    * Two packages are equal if they have the same name.
142    *
143    * @param obj The object to compare to.
144    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is equal to this package.
145    */
146   @Override /* Object */
147   public boolean equals(Object obj) {
148      if (obj instanceof PackageInfo obj2)
149         return inner.equals(obj2.inner);
150      return inner.equals(obj);
151   }
152
153   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
154   // Package methods
155   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
156
157   @Override /* Annotatable */
158   public AnnotatableType getAnnotatableType() { return AnnotatableType.PACKAGE_TYPE; }
159
160   /**
161    * Returns all annotations on this package, wrapped in {@link AnnotationInfo} objects.
162    *
163    * <p>
164    * Cached and unmodifiable.
165    * Repeated annotations (from {@code @Repeatable} containers) have been automatically unwrapped and are present as individual instances in the list.
166    *
167    * @return All annotations present on this package, or an empty list if there are none.
168    */
169   public List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>> getAnnotations() { return annotations.get(); }
170
171   /**
172    * Returns this package's annotations of the specified type (including repeated annotations), wrapped in {@link AnnotationInfo}.
173    *
174    * <p>
175    * Filters the cached annotations list by type.
176    *
177    * @param <A> The annotation type.
178    * @param type The annotation type.
179    * @return A stream of annotation infos of the specified type, never <jk>null</jk>.
180    */
181   @SuppressWarnings({
182      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for annotation stream
183   })
184   public <A extends Annotation> Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>> getAnnotations(Class<A> type) {
185      return getAnnotations().stream().filter(ai -> type.isInstance(ai.inner())).map(ai -> (AnnotationInfo<A>)ai);
186   }
187
188   /**
189    * Returns the title of this package's implementation.
190    *
191    * <p>
192    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationTitle()}.
193    *
194    * @return The implementation title, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
195    * @see Package#getImplementationTitle()
196    */
197   public String getImplementationTitle() { return inner.getImplementationTitle(); }
198
199   /**
200    * Returns the name of the organization that provided this package's implementation.
201    *
202    * <p>
203    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationVendor()}.
204    *
205    * @return The implementation vendor, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
206    * @see Package#getImplementationVendor()
207    */
208   public String getImplementationVendor() { return inner.getImplementationVendor(); }
209
210   /**
211    * Returns the version of this package's implementation.
212    *
213    * <p>
214    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationVersion()}.
215    *
216    * @return The implementation version, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
217    * @see Package#getImplementationVersion()
218    */
219   public String getImplementationVersion() { return inner.getImplementationVersion(); }
220
221   @Override /* Annotatable */
222   public String getLabel() { return getName(); }
223
224   /**
225    * Returns the name of this package.
226    *
227    * <p>
228    * Same as calling {@link Package#getName()}.
229    *
230    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
231    * <p class='bjava'>
232    *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>);
233    *    String <jv>name</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.getName();  <jc>// "java.lang"</jc>
234    * </p>
235    *
236    * @return The fully-qualified name of this package.
237    * @see Package#getName()
238    */
239   public String getName() { return inner.getName(); }
240
241   /**
242    * Returns the title of the specification that this package implements.
243    *
244    * <p>
245    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationTitle()}.
246    *
247    * @return The specification title, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
248    * @see Package#getSpecificationTitle()
249    */
250   public String getSpecificationTitle() { return inner.getSpecificationTitle(); }
251
252   /**
253    * Returns the name of the organization that maintains the specification implemented by this package.
254    *
255    * <p>
256    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationVendor()}.
257    *
258    * @return The specification vendor, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
259    * @see Package#getSpecificationVendor()
260    */
261   public String getSpecificationVendor() { return inner.getSpecificationVendor(); }
262
263   /**
264    * Returns the version number of the specification that this package implements.
265    *
266    * <p>
267    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationVersion()}.
268    *
269    * <p>
270    * This version string must be a sequence of nonnegative decimal integers separated by periods
271    * and may have leading zeros.
272    *
273    * @return The specification version, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
274    * @see Package#getSpecificationVersion()
275    */
276   public String getSpecificationVersion() { return inner.getSpecificationVersion(); }
277
278   /**
279    * Returns the hash code of this package.
280    *
281    * <p>
282    * Same as calling {@link Package#hashCode()}.
283    *
284    * @return The hash code of this package.
285    */
286   @Override /* Object */
287   public int hashCode() {
288      return inner.hashCode();
289   }
290
291   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
292   // Object methods
293   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
294
295   /**
296    * Returns the wrapped {@link Package} object.
297    *
298    * @return The wrapped {@link Package} object.
299    */
300   public Package inner() {
301      return inner;
302   }
303
304   /**
305    * Compares this package's specification version with a desired version.
306    *
307    * <p>
308    * Same as calling {@link Package#isCompatibleWith(String)}.
309    *
310    * <p>
311    * The version strings are compared by comparing each decimal integer in the version string.
312    *
313    * @param desired The desired version.
314    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package's specification version is compatible with the desired version.
315    * @throws NumberFormatException If the desired or current version is not in the correct format.
316    * @see Package#isCompatibleWith(String)
317    */
318   public boolean isCompatibleWith(String desired) throws NumberFormatException {
319      return inner.isCompatibleWith(desired);  // HTT - Hard to test normal return path: requires package with version set in JAR manifest (Specification-Version header), which is difficult to set in test environment
320   }
321
322   /**
323    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed.
324    *
325    * <p>
326    * Same as calling {@link Package#isSealed()}.
327    *
328    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed.
329    * @see Package#isSealed()
330    */
331   public boolean isSealed() { return inner.isSealed(); }
332
333   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
334   // Annotatable interface methods
335   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
336
337   /**
338    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed with respect to the specified code source URL.
339    *
340    * <p>
341    * Same as calling {@link Package#isSealed(URL)}.
342    *
343    * @param url The code source URL.
344    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed with respect to the specified URL.
345    * @see Package#isSealed(URL)
346    */
347   public boolean isSealed(URL url) {
348      return inner.isSealed(url);
349   }
350
351   /**
352    * Returns the string representation of this package.
353    *
354    * <p>
355    * Same as calling {@link Package#toString()}.
356    *
357    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
358    * <p class='bjava'>
359    *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>);
360    *    String <jv>s</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.toString();  <jc>// "package java.lang"</jc>
361    * </p>
362    *
363    * @return The string representation of this package.
364    * @see Package#toString()
365    */
366   @Override /* Object */
367   public String toString() {
368      return inner.toString();
369   }
370}
